author: Henrique Sebastião
description: With Downtify you can download Spotify musics containing album art, track names, album title and other metadata about the songs. Just copy the Spotify link, whether it's a single song, an album, etc. As soon as your downloads are complete you will be notified!
tagline: Download Spotify music with album art and metadata
release_notes:
- v2.7.0 adds configurable parallel downloads.
- It adds weekly and monthly playlist synchronization intervals.
- Dependency maintenance updates are included.
title: Downtify
